description: Your manager has left a new hire specification file at /home/ga/Desktop/new_hire_spec.txt. Complete the full onboarding process in OrangeHRM for each employee listed in the file. For each new hire, create their employee record using the provided name and ID, set their work contact details, and assign their job title and department. Additionally, add an emergency contact with realistic values and assign an annual leave entitlement of 15 days for the current calendar year.
